title: explorer pack
description: A great modpack for minecraft with more structures more biomes and first person animations! And plenty more stuff.
body: this modpack adds 1:more biomes 2:more structures 3:shader like bliss,complementry,solas,mellow and much much more 4:more trims for your elytra weapons and now you can even dye your trims with dye 5:and first person animations 6:fps boosters so your computer wont crash :)
